title: Khan Academy Kids - Science Explorers
objective: Discover animals, plants, and nature through science activities inside the app

data.text: Welcome to Science Explorers. Ask questions, match facts, trace a science word, and think like a young scientist.

data.question: What do plants need to grow?
data.hint: Plants need both water from the soil and sunlight from the sky.

data.question: Which animal can fly?
data.hint: Birds have wings and can fly through the air.

data.question: What do caterpillars turn into?
data.hint: Caterpillars make a cocoon and then become beautiful butterflies!

data.question: What color is the sky on a clear day?
data.hint: The sky looks blue because of how sunlight travels through the air.

data.instruction: Match the science idea to the example.

data.guide: Follow the dotted science word carefully.

data.prompt: Type one thing a plant needs to grow.
data.hint: Think about water, sunlight, air, or soil.

data.title: More Khan Kids Science
data.description: Open Khan Academy Kids for more science songs, books, and activities.
